case_title: JASMINE CREAMER VS. KENNETH JONES SR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
